PartReservation.title: Part Reservation
PartReservation.description: Represents the status of a specific Quran part.

userName.description: The name of the person who reserved/completed it

ownerId.description: Local storage user ID for basic ownership

readCount.description: Number of times this part has been completed

amenCount.description: Total number of people who said Amen

VisitorMessage.title: Visitor Message
VisitorMessage.description: A message left by a visitor.

AppConfig.title: App Config
AppConfig.description: Dynamic configuration for the app (e.g. bio).

/parts/{partId}.description: Collection of Quran parts and their current status.

/messages/{messageId}.description: Messages from visitors seeking to express condolences.
